ddls:
CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "composite_hpi" REAL /* Composite Housing Price Index (HPI) */,
  "single_family_hpi" REAL /* Single-Family Housing Price Index (HPI) */,
  "one_storey_hpi" REAL /* One-Storey Housing Price Index (HPI) */,
  "two_storey_hpi" REAL /* Two-Storey Housing Price Index (HPI) */,
  "townhouse_hpi" REAL /* Townhouse Housing Price Index (HPI) */,
  "apartment_hpi" REAL /* Apartment Housing Price Index (HPI) */,
  "composite_benchmark" REAL /* Composite Benchmark Value */,
  "single_family_benchmark" REAL /* Single-Family Benchmark Value */,
  "one_storey_benchmark" REAL /* One-Storey Benchmark Value */,
  "two_storey_benchmark" REAL /* Two-Storey Benchmark Value */,
  "townhouse_benchmark" REAL /* Townhouse Benchmark Value */,
  "apartment_benchmark" REAL /* Apartment Benchmark Value */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the region */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the region */,
  "public_transportation_score" REAL /* Score for public transportation (0-100) */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate of the region */,
  "cost_of_living_index" REAL /* Cost of living index for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "average_size" REAL /* Average size of the property type in square feet */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the property type */,
  "average_age" INTEGER /* Average age of the property type in years */,
  "average_rooms" INTEGER /* Average number of rooms in the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hpi_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HPI index */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type the index belongs to */,
  "hpi_name" TEXT /* Name of the HPI index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the HPI index */,
  "index_source" TEXT /* Source of the HPI index */,
  "index_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the HPI index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_values" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark value */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type the benchmark belongs to */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark value */,
  "benchmark_source" TEXT /* Source of the benchmark value */,
  "benchmark_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the benchmark value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HPI index */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark value */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES hpi_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmark_values ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., real estate agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "characteristic1" TEXT /* First characteristic of the property type */,
  "characteristic2" TEXT /* Second characteristic of the property type */,
  "characteristic3" TEXT /* Third characteristic of the property type */,
  "characteristic4" TEXT /* Fourth characteristic of the property type */,
  "characteristic5" TEXT /* Fifth characteristic of the property type */,
  "characteristic6" TEXT /* Sixth characteristic of the property type */,
  "characteristic7" TEXT /* Seventh characteristic of the property type */,
  "characteristic8" TEXT /* Eighth characteristic of the property type */,
  "characteristic9" TEXT /* Ninth characteristic of the property type */,
  "characteristic10" TEXT /* Tenth characteristic of the property type */,
  "characteristic11" TEXT /* Eleventh characteristic of the property type */,
  "characteristic12" TEXT /* Twelfth characteristic of the property type */,
  "characteristic13" TEXT /* Thirteenth characteristic of the property type */,
  "characteristic14" TEXT /* Fourteenth characteristic of the property type */,
  "characteristic15" TEXT /* Fifteenth characteristic of the property type */,
  "average_lot_size" REAL /* Average lot size of the property type in square feet */,
  "average_energy_efficiency" REAL /* Average energy efficiency score (0-100) */,
  "average_maintenance_cost" REAL /* Average annual maintenance cost of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_metadata_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "characteristic1" TEXT /* First characteristic of the region */,
  "characteristic2" TEXT /* Second characteristic of the region */,
  "characteristic3" TEXT /* Third characteristic of the region */,
  "characteristic4" TEXT /* Fourth characteristic of the region */,
  "characteristic5" TEXT /* Fifth characteristic of the region */,
  "characteristic6" TEXT /* Sixth characteristic of the region */,
  "characteristic7" TEXT /* Seventh characteristic of the region */,
  "characteristic8" TEXT /* Eighth characteristic of the region */,
  "characteristic9" TEXT /* Ninth characteristic of the region */,
  "characteristic10" TEXT /* Tenth characteristic of the region */,
  "characteristic11" TEXT /* Eleventh characteristic of the region */,
  "characteristic12" TEXT /* Twelfth characteristic of the region */,
  "characteristic13" TEXT /* Thirteenth characteristic of the region */,
  "characteristic14" TEXT /* Fourteenth characteristic of the region */,
  "characteristic15" TEXT /* Fifteenth characteristic of the region */,
  "average_housing_age" INTEGER /* Average age of housing in the region in years */,
  "average_housing_size" REAL /* Average size of housing in the region in square feet */,
  "average_housing_price" REAL /* Average price of housing in the region */,
  "average_housing_rooms" INTEGER /* Average number of rooms in housing in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_metadata_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred region */,
  "preferred_property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred property type */,
  "preferred_hpi_index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred HPI index */,
  "preferred_benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred benchmark value */,
  "preferred_date_range_start" TEXT /* Start date of the preferred date range */,
  "preferred_date_range_end" TEXT /* End date of the preferred date range */,
  "preferred_sort_order" TEXT /* Preferred sort order (e.g., ascending, descending) */,
  "preferred_view_mode" TEXT /* Preferred view mode (e.g., table, chart) */,
  "preferred_ip_address" TEXT /* Preferred IP address for accessing the platform */,
  "preferred_device_type" TEXT /* Preferred device type (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "preferred_access_frequency" TEXT /* Preferred frequency of access (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmark_values ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_hpi_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_hpi_index_id") REFERENCES hpi_indices ("index_id")
)
